versions.version_description: 80's pop-rock feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords which support the melody and harmonies. Each chorus builds in length, intensity, and complexity as they go by. Outro fades out over the spoken final line.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Voices Carry – 'Til Tuesday


[Intro]
||: [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] :||

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
In the dark, I like to read his mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm frightened of the things I might find[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, there must be something he's thinking of to tear him away[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
When I tell him that I'm falling in love why does he say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry     Uh-uh[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I try so hard not to get upset[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Because I know all the trouble I'll get[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, he tells me tears are something to hide and something to fear[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And I try so hard to keep it inside so no one can hear[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry    Uh-uh[/tab]

[Synth Solo]
(It moves quick) [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]
He wants me but only part of the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]
He wants me if he can keep me in line[/tab]

[Repeat chorus until end]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry[/tab]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry
Hush hush, shut up now, voices carry
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry
Oh hush hush, darling, he might overhear
Hush, hush - voices carry
He said shut up - He said shut up
Oh God, can't you keep it down
Voices carry
Hush hush, voices carry
I wish he would let me talk

Synth riff after each line in the verse arranged for a one guitar situation:
[tab][ch]G[/ch] - 355433   [ch]G9[/ch] - 353435   [ch]G7[/ch] - 353463 /  [ch]G7[/ch] - 353463   [ch]G[/ch] - 355433   [ch]G[/ch] - 355433
Use your pinky to move between the G9 and G7 while maintaining a G barre chord.[/tab]

On the chorus I like to play the keyboard riff inside the chords:
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch] /    [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] /    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Gsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Gsus4[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Oh Hush hush.        Keep it down now.     Voices carry.[/tab]

The timing in the chorus will take some practice but it really adds a lot to
the sound if you're only one guitar.
